chosen.theme: G7 Synchronized Rate Hold — Hormuz Energy Shock Locks All Major Central Banks Into Monetary Paralysis Simultaneously
chosen.news_one_liner: RBA joins G7 central banks hiking into an energy shock, extending the synchronized monetary paralysis thesis to developed markets beyond the G7 core as ASX rate-sensitive stocks sell off.

candidates.theme: US-Iran War Escalation & Strait of Hormuz Blockade Threat
candidates.news_one_liner: Iran-US tensions drove a second straight day of Indian equity losses with accelerating FII outflows, adding capital markets to manufacturing employment as a documented EM damage channel.

candidates.theme: G7 Synchronized Rate Hold — Hormuz Energy Shock Locks All Major Central Banks Into Monetary Paralysis Simultaneously
candidates.news_one_liner: RBA joins G7 central banks hiking into an energy shock, extending the synchronized monetary paralysis thesis to developed markets beyond the G7 core as ASX rate-sensitive stocks sell off.

candidates.theme: AI Capex Supercycle Redirects Institutional Flows Into Semiconductors — Chip ETFs Dominate 2026 Inflows as Big Tech Loses Narrative Leadership
candidates.news_one_liner: ARK's top 11 AI and data center picks add a retail flow catalyst layer to the AI capex supercycle, reinforcing NVDA, PLTR, and AMD as dual institutional-retail conviction targets.

candidates.theme: Germany GDP Forecast Downgrade — Iran Energy Shock Delivers First Major Developed Market Growth Casualty
candidates.news_one_liner: Germany faces three simultaneous shocks — Hormuz energy costs, US auto tariffs, and trade deal credibility collapse — pushing GDP downgrade risk beyond consensus estimates.

candidates.theme: US-EU Auto Tariff Escalation — Trump's 25% Tariff Threat Opens New Trade War Front Against Europe's Largest Export Sector
candidates.news_one_liner: Trump renewed 25% EU auto tariff threats just after the EU ratified a trade deal, destroying negotiation credibility and widening the trade war front against German automakers.

candidates.theme: Non-Tariff Barrier Trade Fragmentation — UNCTAD Quantifies 10% LDC Export Loss as Deglobalization Extends Beyond Tariff Disputes
candidates.news_one_liner: UNCTAD finds LDCs losing 10% of G20 exports to non-tariff barriers, deepening trade fragmentation beyond headline tariff disputes and pressuring EM commodity exporters.

candidates.theme: US Consumer Confidence-Spending Divergence — Sentiment at Record Lows While Hard Data Holds, Flagging Deferred Recession Risk
candidates.news_one_liner: Visa's strongest growth since 2022 widens hard-data resilience evidence, keeping the soft-landing consensus alive while sentiment-spending divergence remains unresolved.

candidates.theme: SEC ESG Enforcement Activation — Sustainability Disclosure Mandates Shift From Voluntary to Coercive Compliance Phase
candidates.news_one_liner: SEC enforcement of sustainability disclosures raises compliance costs for energy and materials firms, accelerating mandatory ESG reporting across US markets.

candidates.theme: Commercial Space Launch Sector Institutionalization — Rocket Lab Record Contract and 2027 Breakeven Path Signal Government Demand Inflection
candidates.news_one_liner: Rocket Lab's record contract and 2027 breakeven path unlock institutional buying as commercial space transitions from speculative to earnings-visible.

candidates.news_one_liner: GameStop's $56B eBay bid sent GME lower as investors rejected the deal's feasibility, creating a binary overhang for EBAY.

candidates.theme: UK Trumpflation Stagflation — Dual Energy and Tariff Shock Erodes British Savers' Real Wealth as BoE Rate Hold Fails to Keep Pace
candidates.news_one_liner: UK savers are losing real wealth as energy and tariff inflation outpaces deposit rates, threatening UK banks, retailers, and sterling.
